title: encode_pli: Missing buffer bounds check before writing subtype byte
description: In rust/lichen-core/src/compact_cot.rs, the new encode_pli() helper writes buf[0] = subtype as u8 without first checking that the buffer has at least 1 byte available. If called with an empty buffer, this will panic on out-of-bounds access. The fix is to add a bounds check at the start: if buf.is_empty() { return Err(EncodeError::BufferTooSmall(...)); }
